name: Maou
description: **Favorite Food:** Beer, plum wine, mayonnaise, and curry. He is the most powerful and invincible three-eyed monster, standing at the pinnacle of all demons. He has a terrifying, charismatic presence and a dignified appearance, but his true face is that of a doting father who dotes on his only daughter, [Maomao](https://anilist.co/character/151038/Maomao). He also has an otaku side, such as following voice actors and watching Sunday morning TV shows.

name: Mizuki Aikawa
description: Mizuki is a quiet girl, who has lived a privileged life. She feels extremely pressured by her mother to be something she doesn't want to be, and seeks refuge in the kindness of her best friend Mako. ~!Her brother committed suicide due to the pressures received from their parents. As a result they turned their focus onto Mizuki to follow into her father's steps as a diet member.!~

name: Mytho
description: Mytho was once a heroic and kind Prince who protected the helpless, yet in one of his many battles he encountered a raven. The only way to defeat the monster was to shatter his heart to seal it away. In doing so, he lost all emotions and was left rather lifeless. During the beginning of the series, Mytho is dependent on Fakir for his well-being and care---the two have been friends since youth. He is also Rue's boyfriend, but whether by command or because he bluntly doesn't know better is never q

name: Naho Takada
description: She is a servant of the Butterfly Estate.

name: Natsume
description: Natsume is the Gym Leader of Yamabuki City's Gym, known officially as the Yamabuki Gym. She hands out the Marsh Badge to Trainers who defeat her. She possesses psychic abilities and specializes in Psychic-type Pokémon. As Natsume's psychic powers increased, she grew more obsessed with developing them. She also became less emotional, using her abilities for destructive purposes. This caused a deep psychological rift, and the emotions she tried to shut off developed into a separate personality: a

name: Nina
description: A witch apprentice who owns a boutique called Ura-Harajuku in Harajuku, Japan.

name: Riho Flavin
description: A mercenary with one arm. Her left arm has been replaced with a powerful mechanical prosthesis. She joined the army as part of an agreement with the military instructor Merthophan Dextro in exchange for having her criminal record expunged. She's constantly watching for ways to use others to her benefit.

description: An old butler that was sent to serve the Duke in his solitary, alongside Alice.

name: Romeo
description: Romeo is a kind-hearted boy, who was raised in a loving environment. For this reason, he is excessively optimistic that no matter how bad things may be, they will inevitably work out in the end. It is this reasoning that allows him to survive the many hardships that he is forced to endure after he sells himself into what amounts to slavery. (Source: ex.org)

name: Ryouma Hoshi
description: __Height:__ 105cm (3'5") __Talent:__ Ultimate Tennis Pro World famous since his middle school days, he was a promising young player who was winning matches abroad, but he killed mafia members by hitting them in the head with his custom-made steel tennis ball. The organization was annihilated, and he became a prisoner on death row known by the name of "Killer Tennis". Because he was incarcerated before coming to Saishuu, he says that the SHSL Tennis Player already is no more. (Source: VNDB)
mediaTitles: New Danganronpa V3: Minna no Koroshiai Shin Gakki Comic Anthology

name: Ryuunosuke Akutagawa
description: The Bungou to Alchemist version of Ryuunosuke Akutagawa.

name: Sawa Yukimura
description: Sawa is from the blue-blooded clan with special powers. She has the best mental strength, physical strength, and skills among the executioners. While Sawa is the owner of Tsuyukusa Bookshop during the day, she lives behind the scenes as an executioner of "Nue." She avoids being involved with others and is unfriendly. Sawa is strict with herself, as well as with others.
mediaTitles: JORAN THE PRINCESS OF SNOW AND BLOOD
searchTerms: JORAN THE PRINCESS OF SNOW AND BLOOD

name: Seiji Matoba
description: Age: 22 Birthday: November 1 Height: 174cm The head of one of the major exorcism clans, the Matoba Clan. In order to hunt them, he shows ayakashi, and sometimes even humans, no mercy. He takes great interest in Natsume. ~! Cold hearted and rational. He uses ayakashi as bait to exorcise other ones and wants stronger ones to protect humans (although he doesn't mind hurting humans too when they're in his way). Ayakashis are just replaceable tools for him. He mainly uses a bow and arrow against them

name: Selma Clodel
description: She is the leader of the S-rank party that reigns supreme within the major clan, "Night Sky Silver Rabbits," and is the continent's greatest "Enchanter." She has had a high opinion of [Orhun](https://anilist.co/character/356657/Orhun-Dura) since his days in the "Hero Party," even entrusting him with accompanying her on "Training Expeditions," a training ground for new recruits. She dotes on her younger sister, [Sophia](https://anilist.co/character/356658/Sophia-Clodel), with all her heart.
mediaTitles: Yuusha Party wo Oidasareta Kiyou Binbou 2nd Season
searchTerms: Yuusha Party wo Oidasareta Kiyou Binbou 2nd Season

name: Sherlock Shellingford
nativeName: シャーロック・シェリンフォード
description: An airheaded detective apprentice whose toy gives her the power of telekinesis. She's always in good spirits and trying to stop her friends from fighting. She's also shown to have an affinity for animals though it is unclear whether they share her feelings.
searchTerms: シャーロック・シェリンフォード

name: Shiho Shishido
description: Shiho Shishido is Yōko's childhood friend and a wolfman. Initially appearing as Shirō, an intimidating man with sharp teeth, upon seeing the moon (or an image of), he transforms into Shiho, a busty charismatic female pervert. A second glimpse of the moon transforms Shishido back.
mediaTitles: My Monster Secret: Actually, I Am…
searchTerms: My Monster Secret: Actually, I Am…

name: Shyarly
description: **First Appearance**: Chapter 610/Episode 529 Madame Shyarly (マダム・シャーリー Madamu Shārī) is a short fin mako shark mermaid and Arlong's little sister. She is a fortune teller living on Fishman Island and is also the proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe. Madame Shirley accurately predicted the dawning of the Great Age of Pirates, ~!as well as the outcome of the Whitebeard War and Whitebeard's death.!~ (Source: One Piece Wikia)
mediaTitles: One Piece Log: Fish-Man Island Saga
searchTerms: One Piece Log: Fish-Man Island Saga
